message:
test(ftui-extras): improve doom/map.rs test coverage (bd-152kz)

Add 17 new tests (21→38 total) covering player_start edge cases,
linedef both-sidedef lookup, parse_child max values, sector sky
case sensitivity, NodeChild/Node/SideDef fields, DoomMap
clone/debug, and Copy/Clone trait verification for map types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
